headline: Killio turns scattered teamwork into one clear flow.
subheadline: Plan boards, draft docs, and lock decisions with AI support without context switching all day.

features.title: Built for teams that execute fast

focus.title: Context first boards
focus.description: Capture priorities, assign ownership, and keep execution visible in one place.

ai.title: AI copilots in your flow
ai.description: Generate drafts, summarize updates, and move from idea to deliverable in minutes.

trust.title: Operational trust
trust.description: Role based access, activity history, and notifications designed for distributed teams.

integrations.title: Integrations and automation that execute by themselves
integrations.description: Connect GitHub and external tools, receive webhooks, and turn events into actions in your workspace.

github.title: GitHub commits
github.description: Trigger flows from push events and route work automatically.

webhook.title: Public webhooks
webhook.description: Receive external payloads with secure script-specific URLs.

conditions.title: Smart routing
conditions.description: Use conditions and transforms to send each item to the right action.

actions.title: Killio actions
actions.description: Create, update, move, and assign cards from one automation graph.

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.title: Start free, scale with Enterprise
pricing.subtitle: Only two plans right now: Free and Enterprise. We are not offering a Pro tier yet.

free.name: Free
free.description: For small teams validating workflows and automations.
free.limit1: Up to 100 automation runs per month
free.limit3: Core boards, docs, and activity history

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations that need controls, scale, and governance.

routes.title: Public routes check
routes.subtitle: These public routes are active and ready.

showcase.title: One operating view for work that usually lives in five tabs.
showcase.description: Boards, docs, decisions, AI summaries, and execution signals stay in one place so teams move faster with less drag.

alignment.title: Align workspace rollout
alignment.body: Confirm navigation, legal routes, and public entry points before launch.

bricks.title: Refine document bricks
bricks.body: Turn research into summary blocks, checklists, and references for the team.

launch.title: Review launch narrative
launch.body: Check final messaging, cookie handling, and sign-up flow before shipping.

bricks.summary: Landing, legal, and authentication changes are grouped into one brief so the team sees narrative, tasks, and next actions in context.
bricks.checklistOne: Sync legal links across footer and signup
bricks.checklistTwo: Confirm AI and board showcase copy for launch

copilot.label: Copilot
copilot.name: Execution assistant
copilot.userPrompt: Summarize what changed, create follow-up tasks, and draft a short launch note.
copilot.assistantReply: I reviewed the workspace context and prepared the next actions.

one.title: Collect the signal
one.description: Bring notes, links, and requests into boards and docs without losing the thread.

two.title: Clarify with AI
two.description: Turn noisy updates into clear action items, summaries, and sharable status.

three.title: Ship with confidence
three.description: Track movement, resolve blockers, and keep everyone aligned from kickoff to done.

proof.title: Built for teams that need clarity before speed becomes chaos.
proof.description: Killio gives operators, founders, and delivery teams one place to align priorities, keep decisions visible, and ship without losing the thread.

auth.title: Your login and register flow stays intact
auth.description: We keep the same auth routes and make entry points clearer from the landing experience.
auth.loginDescription: Jump back into your latest workspace and continue exactly where you paused.
auth.signupDescription: Create your account, invite your team, and start shipping from day one.

final.title: Bring structure to execution before the work gets noisy.
final.description: Create a workspace, accept the terms once, and give your team a sharper operating system from day one.

hero.subtitle: Plan, write, automate and deliver from your phone without changing tools.

flow.title: Flow that ships
flow.description: Boards, docs and meshes connected in one execution layer.

ai.title: AI copilots
ai.description: Generate plans, summaries and actions directly from context.

teams.title: Built for teams
teams.description: Roles, invites and structured collaboration from day one.

launch.title: Start your first workspace in minutes

points.one: Create your team and invite collaborators.
points.two: Open board, document or mesh from one home.
points.three: Automate recurring work with AI actions.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.description: It looks like you've lost your internet connection. Any edits you make to cached documents will sync automatically when you are back online.

footer: Built for fast teams that hate tab chaos.
footerNote: Classic legal routes, transparent consent, and a public front door that does not hijack guests into auth.

hero.sub: Kanban boards, rich documents, infinite mesh canvases — wired together with AI automation. One workspace. Zero friction.
hero.notice: No credit card required · Free plan forever

features.title: Everything your team needs. Nothing you don't.
features.sub: Three powerful workspaces, one seamless experience. Move between boards, docs, and canvases without missing a beat.

kanban.title: Drag-and-drop project flow
kanban.desc: Visual pipelines with cards, tags, assignees, checklists, file attachments, comments, and urgency levels. DnD across columns in real time.

docs.title: Block-based rich editor
docs.desc: Write with slash commands. Add tables, graphs, checklists, code blocks, callouts, media, forms, and math — all draggable and nestable.

mesh.title: Infinite canvas for visual thinkers
mesh.desc: Freeform nodes, connections, shapes, frames, and portals on an infinite whiteboard. Freehand pen tool, AI-assisted context, and collaborative real-time editing.

ai.sub: Automate the repetitive. Unlock the creative. Killio's AI layer works across every workspace feature.

builder.title: Visual Script Builder
builder.desc: Build automation workflows with a node-based canvas editor. Connect triggers, conditions, and actions — no code required.

chat.title: AI Generation & Chat
chat.desc: Ask AI to generate scripts, suggest improvements, summarize cards, or chat directly inside any board or document.

rag.title: RAG Knowledge Base
rag.desc: Killio indexes your workspace into a vector store. AI answers are grounded in your actual data — always accurate, never hallucinated.

integrations.title: Plays well with your whole stack.
integrations.sub: Connect Killio to the tools your team already loves. Trigger automations, sync data, and get notified where you work.

pricing.sub: Start free. Scale when you're ready. All plans include unlimited boards, docs, and team members.

enterprise.title: Need Enterprise?
enterprise.sub: Custom contracts, dedicated infrastructure, SLA guarantees, SSO/SCIM, and a dedicated account manager.

pro.label: Pro
pro.headline: For growing teams that need more power.

max.label: Max
max.headline: For power users who need unlimited scale.

history.title: Activity History
history.desc: Full audit trail of every action across boards, documents, and automations.

metrics.title: Workspace Metrics
metrics.desc: Track team velocity, script usage, AI credit consumption, and more.

roles.title: Team Roles & Invites
roles.desc: Owner, admin, member, and guest roles. Email invites with delivery tracking.

mobile.title: Mobile Ready
mobile.desc: Full mobile layout for boards and documents. Work from anywhere.

sharing.title: Public Sharing
sharing.desc: Share any board, document, or mesh canvas publicly with a single link.

folders.title: Folder Organization
folders.desc: Organize boards and documents into nested folders for clean workspace structure.

cta.sub: Join thousands of teams already using Killio to move faster, think clearer, and build better.
